positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a majestic, bioluminescent mountain fox sitting amongst giant, stylized glowing mushrooms and winding vines. The fox has deep sapphire blue fur with glowing cyan accents at the tips of its tail and ears. The mushrooms glow with soft, ethereal purples and greens. The composition is central, focusing on the fox's silhouette against a dark, deep forest background. High contrast, clean vector-style lines with a cinematic, engraved quality. Concept art, sticker design, minimalist forest magic aesthetic. Vivid colors, deep shadows, symmetrical composition, ink wash style, isolated on a plain background for easy printing.
negative: photorealistic, noise, blurry, ugly, artifact, grain, text, logo, watermark, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, signature
